name: D’Angelo
abstract: Michael Eugene Archer (February 11, 1974 – October 14, 2025), better known by his stage name D'Angelo (), was an American singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, and record producer. Widely regarded as a pioneer of the neo-soul movement, Billboard named him one of the greatest R&B artists, while Rolling Stone ranked him as one of the …

concerts.label: The Music of Prince
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: It's Gonna Be a Beautiful Night

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: I literally watched D’Angelo make “Voodoo” a lot. I didn’t even know. I was there for that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
